    <item>
        <guid>nba529357</guid>
        <title>Jalen Green: Goes for 35 points in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-green-5230</link>
        <description>Green finished with 35 points (14-29 FG, 2-7 3Pt, 5-6 FT), five rebounds, two assists and one block across 35 minutes in Tuesday's 114-110 loss to the Trail Blazers in the Play-In Tournament.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 14 Apr 2026 9:59:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529356</guid>
        <title>Deni Avdija: Erupts for 41 points in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/deni-avdija-5152</link>
        <description>Avdija posted 41 points (15-22 FG, 3-8 3Pt, 8-13 FT), 12 assists, seven rebounds and two blocks across 38 minutes in Tuesday's 114-110 Play-In Tournament win over the Suns.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 14 Apr 2026 9:56:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529355</guid>
        <title>Davion Mitchell: Full stat line in loss</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/davion-mitchell-5354</link>
        <description>Mitchell amassed 28 points (12-24 FG, 4-9 3Pt), six assists, four rebounds, two steals and one block across 48 minutes in Tuesday's 127-126 overtime loss to the Hornets in the Play-In Tournament.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 14 Apr 2026 7:48:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529354</guid>
        <title>LaMelo Ball: Drops 30 points in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/lamelo-ball-5151</link>
        <description>Ball contributed 30 points (12-31 FG, 2-16 3Pt, 4-4 FT), 10 assists, five rebounds, one steal and one block across 40 minutes in Tuesday's 127-126 overtime win over the Heat in the Play-In Tournament.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 14 Apr 2026 7:41:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba529348</guid>
        <title>Bam Adebayo: Won't return Tuesday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/bam-adebayo-4153</link>
        <description>Adebayo (back) won't return to Tuesday's Play-In Tournament game against the Hornets. He'll finish with six points (3-3 FG), three rebounds, one assist and one steal across 11 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Tue, 14 Apr 2026 6:21:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
